name: Belcan, LLC
lede: Belcan runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and it, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Belcan office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Belcan operate in India?
faq.a: Belcan operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.a: Belcan's India GCC footprint spans Hyderabad and Bengaluru.

faq.a: Belcan runs engineering & design and it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Belcan's India GCCs?
faq.a: Belcan's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Belcan's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Belcan's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
